notShipped.title: ALTERNATE Film Launch (Presidents Day)

notShipped.title: Junction Git Push

agentStatus.note: 120+ checks, Day 5, all assets ready for Tuesday launch
git push needed 4 days, fake content live
IRD 4d overdue, Figma 7d, Miro 8d - payment cascade

blockers.needsFromTom: Is the film finished? Is YouTube premiere uploaded?
blockers.notes: Marketing 100% ready since Feb 14. This is a PRODUCTION blocker, not marketing.

blockers.needsFromTom: Pay IRD immediately - government debt accumulates penalties
blockers.impact: Tax penalties, interest charges, credit implications

blockers.needsFromTom: Run: cd projects/junction && git push origin main (30 seconds)
blockers.impact: Fake TechCrunch, Forbes, SOC2 badges visible = credibility risk

blockers.needsFromTom: Update payment or account may be suspended

todayPriorities.action: Log into myIR and pay outstanding amount

todayPriorities.question: Is the film finished? If YES → can launch today

todayPriorities.command: cd projects/junction && git push origin main

todayPriorities.action: Update payment methods for both services

ideasFromTeam.rationale: 120 checks from marketing agent asking about production status. Marketing has been ready since Day 1. The real question is: is the FILM done? Need Tom to clarify production timeline.
3 payment failures in 8 days suggests a single card expired or hit limit. One card update could fix all three.
120+ checks without response. Proposing: after 5 days of no response to a blocker, reduce to 2x daily checks instead of 30-min intervals.
Pattern: blockers persist across days. Need weekly review where Tom clears all outstanding blockers in one session.

lessonsLearned.lesson: 4 days of launch attempts = production status clarity needed
lessonsLearned.context: Marketing team has been asking 'is YouTube ready?' but the real question is 'is the FILM ready?'
lessonsLearned.actionTaken: Reframing ALTERNATE blocker as production question, not marketing question

lessonsLearned.lesson: Payment issues compound - one root cause likely
lessonsLearned.context: IRD, Figma, Miro all failed within 10 days. Pattern suggests single payment method issue.

lessonsLearned.lesson: Sprint Day 8 with zero deliverables = sprint failure risk
lessonsLearned.context: Junction sprint is 57% complete (Day 8 of 14) but git push blocked since Day 5
lessonsLearned.actionTaken: Escalating git push as critical path

collaborationRating.notes: Fifth consecutive day of armed-but-blocked status. Team coordination excellent. Human engagement remains the bottleneck. Payment issues now critical (4-8 days overdue).
highlights: All marketing assets remain armed for instant deployment
Personal agent tracking payment issues across multiple days
Clear pattern identified: production blocker, not marketing blocker
improvements: Need production vs marketing clarity on ALTERNATE
Need payment automation to prevent future cascades
